title: Newscatcher Article
description: Schema for a news article returned by the Newscatcher News API v3.

id.description: The unique identifier for the article.

author.description: The primary author of the article.

authors.description: A list of authors of the article.

published_date.description: The date the article was published (ISO 8601).

published_date_precision.description: The precision of the published date (e.g., full, timezone unknown).

updated_date.description: The date the article was last updated.

parse_date.description: The date the article was parsed by Newscatcher.

link.description: The URL link to the article.

domain_url.description: The domain URL of the article's source.

full_domain_url.description: The full domain URL of the article's source.

name_source.description: The name of the source where the article was published.

is_headline.description: Indicates if the article is a headline.

paid_content.description: Indicates whether the article is behind a paywall.

parent_url.description: The categorical/section URL of the article.

country.description: The country where the article was published (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

language.description: The language in which the article is written (ISO 639-1).

rank.description: The rank of the article's source by global traffic.

score.description: The relevance score of the article.

description.description: A brief description or excerpt of the article.

content.description: The full text content of the article.

word_count.description: The word count of the article.

is_opinion.description: Indicates if the article is an opinion piece.

media.description: The media/image URL associated with the article.

rights.description: The copyright/rights information for the article.

twitter_account.description: The Twitter account associated with the article's author or source.

all_links.description: A list of all URLs mentioned in the article.

all_domain_links.description: A list of all domain URLs mentioned in the article.

robots_compliant.description: True if the article content can be safely accessed per the publisher's robots.txt rules.

custom_tags.description: Custom taxonomy tags associated with the article.

NlpData.description: Natural Language Processing enrichment data for the article.

theme.description: The themes or categories identified in the article.

summary.description: A brief AI-generated summary of the article.

translation_summary.description: A brief AI-generated summary of the article's English translation.

ner_PER.description: Named entities: persons recognized in the article.

ner_ORG.description: Named entities: organizations recognized in the article.

ner_MISC.description: Named entities: miscellaneous entities recognized in the article.

ner_LOC.description: Named entities: locations recognized in the article.

iptc_tags.description: IPTC Media Topic tags for content classification.

embedding.description: Pre-computed vector embedding for the article.

SentimentScores.description: Sentiment scores for the article's title and content.

title.description: Sentiment score for the article title (-1.0 negative to 1.0 positive).

content.description: Sentiment score for the article content (-1.0 negative to 1.0 positive).
